services.title: House Shifting
services.tagline: Stress-free home relocation, door to door
services.metaTitle: House Shifting Services in Karachi & Pakistan | MGT Packers & Movers
services.metaDescription: Professional house shifting services in Karachi and across Pakistan. Expert packing, safe loading, on-time delivery. Get a free quote on WhatsApp today.
services.intro: Moving home is one of life's biggest events, and one of the most stressful. MGT Packers & Movers handles every step of your house shifting in Karachi and across Pakistan with trained labour, quality packing materials and the right vehicle for the job. Whether you're moving a 1-bedroom flat or a full bungalow, we make sure your belongings arrive safely, on time and without a scratch.

features.title: Full-Service Move
features.desc: Disassembly, packing, loading, transport, unloading and reassembly, all by one team.

features.title: Quality Packing Materials
features.desc: Bubble wrap, corrugated sheets, sturdy boxes, blankets and tape for every category of item.

features.title: Trained Labour
features.desc: Experienced movers who handle fragile, heavy and bulky furniture with care.

features.title: Right-Sized Vehicle
features.desc: From Suzuki pickups to 40 ft trailers, we match the truck to your home size.

features.title: On-Time Delivery
features.desc: Pre-planned schedules so your new home is ready when you are.

features.title: Transparent Pricing
features.desc: Clear, written quotes with no hidden charges or last-minute surprises.

process.desc: Share your move details on WhatsApp or call. We send a clear quote within hours.
Our team arrives with materials and packs every item room-by-room with labels.
Loaded into the right-sized vehicle and driven by experienced staff.
We unload, unpack and reassemble furniture at your new home.

faqs.q: How much does house shifting cost in Karachi?
faqs.a: Cost depends on the size of your home, distance, packing materials needed and floor level. A typical 2-bedroom move within Karachi starts from a few thousand rupees. Share your details on WhatsApp for an exact quote.

faqs.q: Do you provide packing materials?
faqs.a: Yes. We bring bubble wrap, corrugated sheets, cartons, blankets, tape and stretch film. You don't need to buy anything separately.

faqs.q: Can you move my house outside Karachi?
faqs.a: Absolutely. We move homes from Karachi to Lahore, Islamabad, Multan, Faisalabad, Hyderabad and across Pakistan.

faqs.q: How long does a house shift take?
faqs.a: A local Karachi move usually takes one day. Inter-city moves take 1-3 days depending on distance.

faqs.q: Are my belongings safe during the move?
faqs.a: Yes. Our trained team uses quality packing materials and careful handling. We treat every item as if it were our own.

services.title: Office Relocation
services.tagline: Move your office without losing a working day
services.metaTitle: Office Relocation Services in Karachi | MGT Packers & Movers
services.metaDescription: Fast, organized office relocation in Karachi and Pakistan. Furniture, IT equipment and files moved safely with minimum downtime. Free quote on WhatsApp.
services.intro: An office move is a complex logistics task. Desks, server racks, files, IT equipment and furniture all need to reach the new location and be set up fast. MGT handles full office relocation in Karachi and across Pakistan with planned schedules, careful packing and trained labour, so your team is back to work the next day.

features.title: Weekend & Night Moves
features.desc: We plan moves outside working hours to avoid downtime.

features.title: IT Equipment Handling
features.desc: Computers, monitors, servers and printers packed with anti-static materials.

features.title: Furniture Disassembly
features.desc: Workstations, conference tables and cabinets disassembled and reassembled by our team.

features.title: Labelled & Indexed
features.desc: Every box and item labelled by department and destination room for fast unpacking.

features.title: Confidential Files
features.desc: Sealed file transport with chain-of-custody handling.

features.title: Project Manager
features.desc: One point of contact from quote to handover.

process.desc: We visit your current and new offices to plan the move.
Detailed plan with timeline, vehicles, labour and cost.
Off-hours packing, careful loading by trained staff.
Furniture reassembled and equipment placed by department.

faqs.q: Can you move our office on a weekend?
faqs.a: Yes, weekend and night moves are our most common request to avoid working-hour downtime.

faqs.q: Do you handle server and IT equipment?
faqs.a: Yes. We use anti-static wrap, foam padding and dedicated boxes for sensitive electronics.

faqs.q: Will you reassemble our workstations?
faqs.a: Yes. Our team disassembles at the old office and reassembles at the new location.

faqs.q: Do you move offices across cities?
faqs.a: Yes. We handle inter-city office relocation across Pakistan.

faqs.q: How far in advance should we book?
faqs.a: We recommend booking 1-2 weeks ahead for a large office. Smaller offices can often be moved within a few days.

services.title: Packing Services
services.metaTitle: Professional Packing Services in Karachi | MGT Packers & Movers
services.metaDescription: Expert packing services in Karachi with premium materials: bubble wrap, cartons, blankets and trained packers for fragile, electronics and household items.
services.intro: Good packing is the difference between a smooth move and broken belongings. MGT's professional packing service in Karachi uses premium materials and trained packers to protect everything from delicate glassware and TVs to heavy furniture and artwork. You can book packing on its own or as part of a full house shift.

features.title: Bubble Wrap & Foam
features.desc: Multi-layer protection for fragile and high-value items.

features.title: Corrugated Sheets
features.desc: Heavy-duty protection for furniture corners and large surfaces.

features.title: Strong Cartons
features.desc: Double-wall boxes in multiple sizes for books, clothes, kitchenware.

features.title: TV & Electronics Boxes
features.desc: Dedicated boxes with foam inserts for screens and appliances.

features.title: Wardrobe Boxes
features.desc: Hanging-ready boxes that keep clothes wrinkle-free.

features.title: Labelling System
features.desc: Every box labelled by room and contents for fast unpacking.

process.desc: We assess items and recommend the right materials.
All packing supplies brought to your home.
Items packed, labelled and stacked safely.
Boxes are loaded directly or stored until move day.

faqs.q: Can I book only packing, without transport?
faqs.a: Yes. Packing is available as a standalone service if you want to handle transport yourself.

faqs.q: What kind of packing materials do you use?
faqs.a: Bubble wrap, foam sheets, corrugated rolls, double-wall cartons, stretch film, blankets and tape.

faqs.q: Do you pack fragile items like glassware and artwork?
faqs.a: Yes. We use multi-layer wrapping and dedicated boxes for fragile and high-value items.

faqs.q: How long does packing take for a 2-bedroom home?
faqs.a: Usually 4-6 hours with a team of 2-3 packers.

faqs.q: Will you unpack at the new location?
faqs.a: Yes, unpacking is available on request as part of the service.

services.title: Loading & Unloading
services.metaTitle: Loading & Unloading Services in Karachi | MGT Packers & Movers
services.metaDescription: Trained loading and unloading labour in Karachi for household goods, furniture and commercial cargo. Hourly or per-job rates. Book on WhatsApp.
services.intro: Even if you have your own truck, professional loading and unloading is what keeps your belongings safe. MGT supplies trained labour in Karachi for households, shops, warehouses and inter-city cargo, skilled at handling heavy furniture, fragile boxes and bulky appliances without damage.

features.title: Trained Movers
features.desc: Experienced with furniture, appliances, glass and heavy crates.

features.title: Proper Lifting
features.desc: Correct technique to protect items and avoid injuries.

features.title: Furniture Padding
features.desc: Blankets and straps used to secure load inside the vehicle.

features.title: Stair & Floor Service
features.desc: Comfortable carrying items up and down stairs and through tight spaces.

features.title: Flexible Booking
features.desc: Hourly, half-day or full-day rates available.

features.title: Available Across Karachi
features.desc: Same-day service in most areas of the city.

process.desc: Number of items, floor level and location on WhatsApp.
Hourly or fixed-job rate confirmed in minutes.
Team comes equipped with padding and tools.
Items handled, stacked and secured properly.

faqs.q: Can I hire only labour without a truck?
faqs.a: Yes. We provide loading and unloading labour as a standalone service.

faqs.q: How many movers will I need?
faqs.a: For a 1-bed home, 2 movers usually work. Larger homes or heavy items need 3-4.

faqs.q: Do you charge by hour or by job?
faqs.a: Both options are available. We'll recommend whichever is cheaper for your case.

faqs.q: Can your team carry items up several floors?
faqs.a: Yes. Stair carrying is included; very high floors may have a small surcharge.

faqs.q: Is your labour insured?
faqs.a: Our team is trained for safe handling. Coverage details are shared on request when booking.

services.title: Warehouse Storage
services.metaTitle: Warehouse Storage in Karachi | Secure Goods Storage | MGT
services.metaDescription: Secure warehouse storage in Karachi for household and commercial goods. Short-term and long-term plans, clean and monitored facility. Get a quote on WhatsApp.
services.intro: Sometimes your new place isn't ready, or you simply need somewhere safe to keep belongings between moves. MGT offers secure warehouse storage in Karachi for household and commercial goods, with flexible short and long-term plans. Items are stored clean, dry and monitored, and we handle pickup and delivery on both ends.

features.title: Clean, Dry Facility
features.desc: Goods stored away from moisture, dust and pests.

features.title: Short or Long Term
features.desc: From a few days to many months, paying only for what you need.

features.title: Itemised Inventory
features.desc: Every item logged on intake and check-out.

features.title: Pickup & Delivery
features.desc: We collect from your home and deliver when you're ready.

features.title: Household & Commercial
features.desc: Storage for furniture, appliances, stock and equipment.

features.title: Monitored Premises
features.desc: Round-the-clock secure facility.

process.desc: Approximate volume and storage duration.
Transparent monthly rates and pickup slot.
We pack, label and log every item into storage.
Request items back any time. We deliver to your new address.

faqs.q: What's the minimum storage period?
faqs.a: We offer storage from as little as one week. There's no minimum lock-in.

faqs.q: How is pricing calculated?
faqs.a: Pricing is based on volume (cubic feet) and storage duration. We share an exact monthly figure upfront.

faqs.q: Can you pick up items from my home?
faqs.a: Yes. Pickup, packing and delivery to the warehouse are all included as one service.

faqs.q: Is my furniture safe in storage?
faqs.a: Yes. The facility is clean, dry, monitored and pest-controlled.

faqs.q: Can I add or remove items during the storage period?
faqs.a: Yes, partial pickups and additions can be arranged with advance notice.

services.title: Cargo Services
services.metaTitle: Cargo Services in Karachi & Pakistan | MGT Packers & Movers
services.metaDescription: Reliable domestic cargo services from Karachi to all of Pakistan. Safe handling, on-time delivery and full tracking for household and commercial cargo.
services.intro: Whether you're sending a few cartons or a full truckload across Pakistan, MGT's cargo services move it safely and on time. We handle household cargo, commercial shipments, machinery, e-commerce stock and personal effects, from Karachi to Lahore, Islamabad, Multan, Faisalabad, Peshawar, Hyderabad and beyond.

features.title: Nationwide Coverage
features.desc: Karachi to every major city in Pakistan.

features.title: Right-Sized Vehicle
features.desc: From Suzuki to 40 ft container, match the vehicle to the shipment.

features.title: Door-to-Door
features.desc: Pickup from your address, delivery to the destination address.

features.title: Safe Handling
features.desc: Trained staff and proper packing for fragile or heavy cargo.

features.title: On-Time Delivery
features.desc: Clear timelines committed at booking.

features.title: Status Updates
features.desc: Stay informed on pickup, transit and delivery.

process.desc: Origin, destination, items and approximate weight/volume.
We recommend the right truck and quote a fixed rate.
Cargo collected, loaded and dispatched on schedule.
Safe unloading and confirmation at destination.

faqs.q: How long does cargo take from Karachi to Lahore?
faqs.a: Typically 1-2 days depending on cargo type and vehicle.

faqs.q: Do you handle fragile cargo?
faqs.a: Yes, we use bubble wrap, foam and corrugated sheets to protect fragile shipments.

faqs.q: Is door-to-door delivery available?
faqs.a: Yes, pickup and delivery to specific addresses is included.

faqs.q: Can you move commercial stock and machinery?
faqs.a: Yes, we regularly move business inventory, equipment and machinery.

faqs.q: How is cargo pricing calculated?
faqs.a: Based on distance, vehicle size, weight/volume and handling requirements. We quote a fixed rate upfront.

services.metaDescription: Nationwide goods transport from Karachi. Suzuki to 40 ft trailers for any load: household, industrial or commercial. Free quote on WhatsApp.
services.intro: MGT (Majid Goods Transport) is built on goods transport, moving everything from a few household items to full industrial loads across Pakistan. We operate a complete fleet ranging from Suzuki pickups to 40 ft trailers, so we can match the right vehicle to your shipment and keep costs efficient.

features.title: Full Vehicle Fleet
features.desc: Suzuki, Shahzore, Mazda, 17/20/24/32/40 ft trucks and trailers.

features.title: Household & Industrial
features.desc: Equally suited to home moves and factory shipments.

features.title: Experienced Drivers
features.desc: Long-route drivers who know every major Pakistani city.

features.title: Loading Crew
features.desc: Trained labour available for loading and unloading on both ends.

features.title: Fixed-Rate Pricing
features.desc: Transparent per-trip pricing, no surprises on arrival.

features.title: Same-Day Booking
features.desc: Trucks often available the same day on common routes.

process.desc: What, how much, where from and where to.
We recommend the most cost-effective truck size.
Loaded and on the road on schedule.
Safe handover at destination.

faqs.q: What truck sizes do you have?
faqs.a: Suzuki pickup, Shahzore, Mazda, 17 ft, 20 ft, 24 ft, 32 ft and 40 ft trailers.

faqs.q: Do you transport goods all over Pakistan?
faqs.a: Yes, we cover Karachi, Lahore, Islamabad, Rawalpindi, Multan, Faisalabad, Peshawar, Quetta, Hyderabad and every major city.

faqs.q: Can I get a truck the same day?
faqs.a: On most common routes, yes. Share your requirement on WhatsApp for current availability.

faqs.q: Do you provide loading labour?
faqs.a: Yes, labour can be added to any transport booking.

faqs.q: How is pricing decided?
faqs.a: Based on truck size, route distance and whether labour or packing is included. We quote a flat per-trip rate.

services.intro: Need just a truck? MGT's full fleet is available on rent in Karachi and for inter-city trips across Pakistan. Whether it's a Suzuki for a single-room shift or a 40 ft trailer for industrial cargo, you get a clean vehicle, professional driver and an honest, upfront rate.

features.title: Complete Fleet

faqs.q: Which truck size do I need?
faqs.a: Suzuki works for a single room. Mazda or Shahzore for 1-2 bedrooms. 17-20 ft for a 3-bed home. Larger trailers for industrial or commercial loads.

services.title: Car Carrier
services.metaTitle: Car Carrier Services in Karachi | Vehicle Transport Pakistan | MGT
services.metaDescription: Safe car carrier services from Karachi to every major Pakistani city. Open and covered carriers, careful loading, insured transport. Quote on WhatsApp.
services.intro: Driving your car between cities adds miles, fuel cost and risk. MGT's car carrier service safely transports your vehicle from Karachi to Lahore, Islamabad, Multan, Peshawar and across Pakistan, on open or fully covered carriers depending on your preference and the level of protection you need.

features.title: Open & Covered Carriers
features.desc: Choose based on weather, distance and vehicle value.

features.title: Safe Loading
features.desc: Professional ramps and tie-downs, no scratches, no shifting.

features.title: Nationwide Routes
features.desc: Karachi to every major city in Pakistan.

features.title: Multiple Vehicles
features.desc: Single or multi-car shipments.

features.title: Pickup Coordination
features.desc: Convenient pickup from your home or showroom.

features.title: On-Time Delivery
features.desc: Committed timelines so you're not left waiting.

process.desc: Make, model, route and preferred carrier type.
Fixed rate and pickup window confirmed.
Vehicle loaded with ramps and secured.
Inspected and handed over at destination.

faqs.q: Should I choose an open or covered carrier?
faqs.a: Open is more economical and fine for standard vehicles. Covered is recommended for luxury or new cars or long routes.

faqs.q: How long does Karachi to Lahore take?
faqs.a: Typically 2-3 days depending on carrier loading schedule.

faqs.q: Is the vehicle insured during transit?
faqs.a: We handle vehicles with professional care and tie-downs. Insurance terms are confirmed in writing before booking.

faqs.q: Can you pick up from a car showroom?
faqs.a: Yes, showroom and home pickups are both available.

faqs.q: Can you ship more than one vehicle?
faqs.a: Yes, multi-car shipments are available on the same carrier.

services.title: International Shipment
services.tagline: Your cargo, delivered across the world
services.metaTitle: International Shipment Services from Pakistan | MGT Packers & Movers
services.metaDescription: Professional international shipment from Pakistan. Air freight, sea cargo, customs clearance and door-to-port delivery. Get a free quote on WhatsApp.
services.intro: MGT Packers & Movers extends its trusted services beyond Pakistan's borders with professional international shipment solutions. Whether you need to send household goods, commercial cargo or personal effects to destinations worldwide, we handle the complete logistics chain — from pickup and professional export packing to customs documentation and delivery at your destination port or door.

features.title: Air Freight
features.desc: Fast, reliable air cargo for urgent or high-value international shipments.

features.title: Sea Cargo (FCL & LCL)
features.desc: Full container and shared container options for large or small international loads.

features.title: Door-to-Port Service
features.desc: We pick up, pack and deliver your cargo to the origin port or airport.

features.title: Customs Documentation
features.desc: All declarations, packing lists and export paperwork handled by our team.

features.title: Export-Grade Packing
features.desc: Heavy-duty export cartons, wooden crating and moisture protection for long voyages.

features.title: Worldwide Coverage
features.desc: Shipping to the Middle East, UK, Europe, North America, Australia and beyond.

process.desc: Tell us what, where and when. We provide a complete landed-cost estimate within 24 hours.
Export-grade packing and all customs paperwork prepared by our team.
Cargo collected from your location and delivered to the nominated port or airport.
Regular updates at every stage until your cargo reaches its destination.

faqs.q: Which countries do you ship to?
faqs.a: We ship to the Middle East, UK, Europe, USA, Canada, Australia and many more. Contact us with your destination for current availability and rates.

faqs.q: What is the difference between air and sea freight?
faqs.a: Air freight is faster (5-10 days) but costs more. Sea freight is more economical for large loads (20-45 days). We recommend the best option for your timeline and budget.

faqs.q: Do you handle customs clearance?
faqs.a: Yes. We prepare all export documentation, packing lists and declarations required for smooth customs clearance at the origin port.

faqs.q: Can I send household goods internationally?
faqs.a: Yes. We offer complete household relocation packing and international shipping for families moving abroad.

faqs.q: How do I get a quote?
faqs.a: Share your goods description, weight or volume estimate and destination on WhatsApp at 0300-1899303. We respond with a full quote within 24 hours.
